name: MikroTik hEX PoE
title: MikroTik hEX PoE | Getic
short_description: CPU 800MHz, 128MB RAM, 1x SFP Cage, 5x GLAN, 1x USB 2.0, Power Output On ports 2-5, Ourput: 1A max per port; 2A max total, RouterOS L4
description: Designed for home and small office setups, these routers offer reliable wired connections via Ethernet cables. With PoE ports, you can power devices like access points and cameras through Ethernet. hEX S and hEX PoE also feature an SFP port for high-speed internet connections using optical cables. The RouterOS operating system by Mikrotik provides extensive network configuration and traffic management capabilities, ensuring a seamless and efficient networking experience.

detailed_description.heading: Introducing the hEX Series Routers
detailed_description.text: Designed for home and small office setups, these routers offer reliable wired connections via Ethernet cables. With PoE ports, you can power devices like access points and cameras through Ethernet. hEX S and hEX PoE also feature an SFP port for high-speed internet connections using optical cables. The RouterOS operating system by Mikrotik provides extensive network configuration and traffic management capabilities, ensuring a seamless and efficient networking experience.

detailed_description.heading: Wired Solution with PoE Capabilities
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hEX PoE Router is an advanced networking device tailor-made for home and small office installations. Specifically designed for users who prioritise wired connections and do not require wireless connectivity, this router boasts innovative features and powerful hardware that ensure reliable network performance.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Hardware
detailed_description.text: Equipped with an incredibly powerful 800MHz CPU and 128MB of RAM, the hEX PoE router handles advanced configurations supported by the RouterOS operating system, developed by MikroTik. Whether you are a networking enthusiast, a tech-savvy professional, or a small business owner, the hEX PoE's processing power guarantees smooth and efficient operation, even during resource-intensive tasks.

detailed_description.heading: Fast Data Transfer
detailed_description.text: Featuring five high-speed 1 Gbps Ethernet ports, the hEX PoE router enables fast data transfer rates over wired connections. Seamlessly connect your computers, printers, and other compatible devices directly through Ethernet cables, ensuring a stable and reliable network environment for data-intensive tasks. The hEX PoE router is a game-changer with its Power over Ethernet (PoE) functionality. With four 802.3af/at PoE out ports, you can easily power and connect PoE-capable devices, such as access points and video cameras, through Ethernet cables. Say goodbye to clutter caused by multiple power adapters and cables – the hEX PoE simplifies your network setup while providing efficient power management.

detailed_description.heading: SFP Port & Optical Fiber Connectivity
detailed_description.text: For enhanced connectivity options, the hEX PoE router features an SFP port, allowing you to easily add optical fiber connectivity to your network. This feature is especially useful for connecting to your internet service provider using optical cables, ensuring high-speed and reliable internet connections.

detailed_description.heading: Storage, USB & Security
detailed_description.text: With 16MB of storage memory and a convenient USB-A 2.0 port, the hEX PoE router ensures ample space for essential configurations and updates. The USB port facilitates easy file sharing, allowing you to connect external storage devices for additional data storage options, enhancing your network's capabilities. Ensuring the utmost security for your network is a top priority, and the hEX PoE router excels in this aspect. With support for IPsec hardware encryption, your sensitive data remains secure, and potential threats are kept at bay.
